summary: Frontend-only validation of new Feed PostCard share button + regression on /marketplace and /planos. All 12 functional assertions passed. The new share button (data-testid='feed-share-{post.id}') on /feed renders at bottom-left as an overlay on the post image with aria-label='Compartilhar post'. Existing like button (feed-like-{post.id}) at bottom-right unchanged — no regression. Clicking share opens the shared ShareSheet (role='dialog', aria-modal='true') with URL exactly '${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/feed#post-{post.id}'. WhatsApp, Instagram and Copiar link buttons render. Copy triggers 'Link copiado' toast. Both X button and overlay backdrop close the sheet. Marketplace share regression: URL still contains '/api/og/marketplace/'. /planos: 4 plan cards (Livre/Essencial/Pro/Studio), Mensal/Anual toggle, FAQ + comparison table (29 rows) all render. No console errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: Feed.jsx PostCard (lines 343-427) correctly composes shareUrl as `${API_BASE}/feed#post-${post.id}` and passes title + description into the shared ShareSheet. Local shareOpen state keeps each card independent — verified by testing first post only.

Share button positioning is symmetric and accessible: bottom-left for share, bottom-right for like, both using the same backdrop-blur-md + bg-black/40 + rounded-full pattern. aria-label='Compartilhar post' present.
ShareSheet is the same reusable portal-based component validated in iter 30. role='dialog' + aria-modal='true' already applied to the inner sheet (closes the a11y recommendation from iter 30).
No file size issue: Feed.jsx (430 lines) is under the 700-line threshold.
test_credentials: Not required — /feed, /marketplace and /planos browsing/share are public.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded post 'TEST_post_p1_refactor' (id=8bc927129698) and marketplace items 4725bf473a59 / 7857a53c29dc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding splash dismissal still required on first visit: set localStorage('onboarding_complete','true') + localStorage('lindart_onboarding_v1', JSON{complete:true,step:5}) at the root URL before navigating, then defensively remove any remaining [data-testid='onboarding-flow'] node. Feed share button testid pattern: feed-share-{post.id}. ShareSheet testids unchanged from iter 30: share-sheet, share-sheet-overlay, share-sheet-close, share-sheet-url, share-sheet-whatsapp, share-sheet-instagram, share-sheet-copy. Grant clipboard-read/write permissions before testing copy. Toast 'Link copiado' appears via react-hot-toast (sometimes duplicated 3x in DOM during animation — still matches substring check).
